# /etc/sudoers.d/nginx-ui — generated by nginx-ui host-setup.
# Install with: sudo visudo -f /etc/sudoers.d/nginx-ui
nginxui ALL=(root) NOPASSWD: \
    /bin/systemctl reload nginx.service, \
    /bin/systemctl restart nginx.service, \
    /usr/sbin/nginx -t, \
    /usr/sbin/nginx -T
Defaults!/bin/systemctl,/usr/sbin/nginx env_keep += "TZ LANG LC_ALL"
